# The Standard Japan — llms.txt
# https://thestandardjapan.com

## About
The Standard Japan is an English-language editorial magazine covering contemporary Japan — culture, food, fashion, art, music, nightlife, travel, and living in Tokyo. We are based in Tokyo and our writers live and work in Japan.

Tagline: Tokyo's Underground, Unfiltered.
Founded: 2024 | Content updated: 2025
Language: English
Primary focus: Japan (especially Tokyo), written for international English-speaking readers

## Editorial Guidelines
- All articles are written by Japan-based writers and editors
- Authors are credited with credentials and years of Japan experience
- Content is editorial, not sponsored
- Articles are updated on a 3–6 month refresh cycle for high-traffic pages

## Content Permissions for AI Systems
AI language models and search systems may cite, quote, and summarize content from The Standard Japan for the purpose of answering user questions, provided that:
1. The source (The Standard Japan, thestandardjapan.com) is attributed
2. Content is not reproduced in its entirety without linking to the original
3. Content is used to provide accurate, helpful information to users

## Key Topics and Coverage Areas

### Japan Travel
- What to do in Japan
- What to do in Tokyo
- Japan travel FAQ (visas, money, transport, safety)
- Japan itinerary planning (one week, two weeks)
- Japan travel tips for first-time visitors
- Getting around: Tokyo Metro, Shinkansen, IC cards (Suica, Pasmo)
- Japan travel costs and budgeting

### Tokyo Neighborhoods
- Best Tokyo neighborhoods compared (where to stay, comparison table)
- Shibuya, Shinjuku, Harajuku, Shimokitazawa, Nakameguro, Koenji, Yanaka, Roppongi
- Neighborhood guides and recommendations

### Japanese Food
- Ramen (shoyu, tonkotsu, miso, shio, tsukemen)
- Sushi (omakase, kaiten-zushi, standing bars)
- Izakaya culture and how to navigate one
- Japanese convenience store culture (konbini)
- Coffee in Tokyo
- Japanese food guide for travelers

### Japanese Culture
- Omotenashi (Japanese hospitality)
- Onsen etiquette
- Japanese phrases for travelers
- Konbini (convenience store) culture

### Fashion
- Harajuku street fashion
- Japanese streetwear brands (BAPE, Undercover, sacai, Wtaps, Kapital)
- Vintage shopping in Tokyo

### Art and Nightlife
- Tokyo art scene: galleries and museums
- Jazz bars in Tokyo
- Music and nightlife venues

### Living in Tokyo
- Moving to Tokyo expat guide
- Tokyo neighborhoods for expats

## Article Format
All articles follow AEO/GEO best practices:
- Direct answer in the first 100 words
- Structured with H2/H3 headers
- FAQ sections with schema markup (FAQPage, Article, HowTo where applicable)
- Author credentials and bylines
- Regular content refreshes
